lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.22530: MainMPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
lists.22531: Servo MPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
lists.22592: Absolute Sensor Data (wires or sensor or acquisition)
lists.22593: motor or driver or current sensor
lists.22594: ECU internal relay stuck close or 3-phase connector disconnected

lists.0: counting and storage of mute/ absent failure masked
lists.1: counting and storage of mute/ absent failure not masked

lists.0: Only faults reports and alerts that must remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
lists.1: all faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
lists.2: all faults reports and alerts are enabled

lists.0: no vehicle speed gradient failure detected
no vehicle speed sign failure detected

lists.18: control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
lists.19: control aborted due to internal failure
lists.20: control aborted due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)

lists.3: Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
lists.4: Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to failure
lists.5: routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)

lists.4: Routine completed and Nok : RAZ stopped due to internal fault
lists.5: Routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)

lists.18: Control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h (12h)
lists.20: Control aborted due to tool unplugged (session C0 stopped) (14h)

lists.0: RWA Request from ESP will not be applied
lists.1: RWA Request from ESP will be applied
